prompt: Compare Perplexity, ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini for enterprise research workflows. Identify where their value propositions overlap and differ.
A consulting team is evaluating whether a regional fast food chain should enter the breakfast market. What factors should they analyze?
Summarize the key risks and opportunities for a startup building multi-model AI answer arbitration.
Given three conflicting market-size estimates for the same product category, explain how you would reconcile them into one defensible estimate.
Identify likely buyer personas for a tool that compares GPT, Claude, and Gemini outputs for accuracy-sensitive work.
Create a competitive landscape for AI research tools used by consultants and strategy teams.
Pressure-test this hypothesis: consulting teams will pay for verified LLM outputs if the tool saves time and improves confidence.
Recommend an initial go-to-market strategy for Spoon targeting consulting firms.
Explain why model disagreement matters in high-stakes knowledge work.
Analyze how source attribution could increase trust in AI-generated consulting research.
